name: BB:NetworkDefinition: Watch List Addresses
notes:
This Building Block defines networks to be included into a watch list.

Edit this BB to include networks which should be added into a watch list.
bb_references: BB:NetworkDefinition: Watch List Addresses on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the any IP is a part of any of the following Watchlists
TD_list: APPLY BB:NetworkDefinition: Watch List Addresses on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the any IP is a part of any of the following Watchlists
